title: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
summary: The White House defends the Argentina team following controversy over a Falklands banner displayed at the World Cup. The statement escalates tensions around the incident, which UK authorities have requested FIFA investigate.
content: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.

zh.title: 白宫就福克兰群岛横幅为阿根廷队辩护
zh.summary: 白宫在因世界杯上展示的福克兰群岛横幅引发争议后为阿根廷队辩护。该声明升级了围绕这一事件的紧张局势，英国当局已要求国际足联进行调查。

title: Arsenal want Villa's Rogers - Saturday's gossip
summary: Arsenal target Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers as summer transfer activity intensifies, while Mohamed Salah is linked with Besiktas and Manchester United pursue Neco Williams. Multiple elite clubs are reshaping their squads ahead of the season.
content: Arsenal want Morgan Rogers, Mohamed Salah is set to join Besiktas, Manchester United are interested in Neco Williams, plus more.

zh.title: 阿森纳想要维拉的罗杰斯 - 周六八卦
zh.summary: 随着夏季转会活动加剧,阿森纳目标是阿斯顿维拉的摩根罗杰斯,同时穆罕默德萨拉赫与贝西克塔斯有联系,曼联追求内科威廉姆斯。多家精英俱乐部正在为新赛季前改造阵容。

title: Tuchel urges England to finish strongly in emotional address
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel delivers an emotional address to his squad after their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina. He urges the team to finish the tournament strongly and recover from their disappointing elimination.
content: England manager Thomas Tuchel urges his players to end the World Cup strongly in an emotional address after their agonising semi-final defeat by Argentina.

zh.title: 图赫尔在情感化讲话中敦促英格兰表现强劲
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在世界杯半决赛输给阿根廷后向球队发表了情感化讲话。他敦促球队在锦标赛中表现强劲,从失望的淘汰中恢复。

title: Stick with Tuchel unless Guardiola is available - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney suggests the Football Association should retain Thomas Tuchel as England manager unless they can attract Pep Guardiola. His comments reflect confidence in Tuchel while acknowledging the rare opportunity that securing Guardiola would represent.
content: Wayne Rooney thinks the Football Association should stick with Thomas Tuchel as England head coach unless a move for Pep Guardiola is possible.

zh.title: 坚持图赫尔,除非瓜迪奥拉可用 - 鲁尼
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼建议足球协会应该保留托马斯·图赫尔作为英格兰主教练,除非他们能吸引佩普·瓜迪奥拉。他的评论反映了对图赫尔的信心,同时承认获得瓜迪奥拉将代表的罕见机会。

title: Ederson extends Atalanta contract after Man Utd move collapses
summary: Atalanta midfielder Ederson extends his contract with the Italian club after a proposed transfer to Manchester United collapsed. The failed move keeps Ederson at Atalanta beyond the summer transfer window.
content: Atalanta midfielder Ederson extends his contract after a move to Manchester United collapses.

zh.title: 埃德森在曼联转会失败后与亚特兰大续约
zh.summary: 亚特兰大中场球员埃德森在拟议的曼联转会失败后与意大利俱乐部续约。这笔失败的转会使埃德森在夏季转会窗口后继续效力亚特兰大。

title: 'It hurts' - Saints boss Eckert on Spygate judgement
summary: Southampton head coach Tonda Eckert responds to judgment regarding his role in a scandal that resulted in the club's expulsion from the Championship play-offs, admitting the ruling has been difficult to accept publicly. The judgment underscores the ongoing consequences of the scandal for the club and its leadership. Eckert's comments reflect the personal and professional toll of the incident.
content: Southampton head coach Tonda Eckert admits it has been "tough to read" judgement on his role in the scandal that saw the club kicked out of the Championship play-offs.

zh.title: 《很伤心》- 圣徒队主帅埃克特谈"间谍门"判决
zh.summary: 南安普顿主教练通达·埃克特对一项关于他在丑闻中所扮演角色的判决作出回应,该丑闻导致该俱乐部被逐出锦标赛季后赛。该判决强调了这一丑闻对俱乐部及其领导层的持续影响。埃克特的评论反映了这一事件的个人和职业代价。

title: Villa complete club record Manzambi signing
summary: Aston Villa secures defender Johan Manzambi for a club record transfer fee exceeding £50m under manager Unai Emery in his first summer signing. The substantial investment signals Villa's ambitions for strengthening their squad ahead of the upcoming season. Manzambi's arrival marks a significant moment in the club's transfer strategy.
content: Unai Emery makes his first summer signing by bringing in Johan Manzambi for a club record fee of just over £50m.

zh.title: 阿斯顿维拉完成俱乐部纪录曼扎姆比签约
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉在主教练乌奈·埃梅里的领导下以超过5000万英镑的俱乐部纪录转会费签下后卫约翰·曼扎姆比,这是他上任以来的首次夏季签约。这笔巨大投资彰显了维拉在即将到来的赛季中加强阵容的雄心。曼扎姆比的到来标志着该俱乐部转会战略中的一个重要时刻。

title: Who could follow as Gordon leaves Scotland as a legend?
summary: Retiring goalkeeper Craig Gordon concludes a distinguished career with Heart of Midlothian and the Scottish national team, leaving a significant legacy in the sport. The focus now turns to identifying his successor for Scotland's goalkeeping position following his retirement. Gordon's departure marks the end of an era in Scottish football.
content: Craig Gordon has retired as a goalkeeping legend with Heart of Midlothian and Scotland, but what is his legacy and who can succeed him with the national team?

zh.title: 戈登作为苏格兰传奇离开,谁将接任?
zh.summary: 退役门神克雷格·戈登以心脏病患者和苏格兰国家队的身份结束了杰出的职业生涯,在体育界留下了重要遗产。现在焦点转向为戈登退役后为苏格兰确定门神接班人。戈登的离开标志着苏格兰足球的一个时代的结束。

title: Iheanacho rejects new Celtic deal for Turkey's second tier
summary: Nigerian striker Kelechi Iheanacho declines contract renewal with Celtic and transfers to Bursaspor in Turkey's second tier, marking an unexpected career shift. The move represents a significant change in Iheanacho's career trajectory after his time in Scotland. Bursaspor recently secured promotion to Turkey's second division.
content: Nigeria striker Kelechi Iheanacho turns down a new contract with Celtic and joins Bursaspor, who have just been promoted to Turkey's second tier.

zh.title: 伊赫纳乔拒绝凯尔特人新合同转投土耳其第二级联赛
zh.summary: 尼日利亚前锋凯莱奇·伊赫纳乔拒绝与凯尔特人续约,转会至土耳其第二级联赛的布尔萨体育队,这是一个意外的职业转变。这一举动代表了伊赫纳乔在苏格兰效力后职业生涯的重大转折。布尔萨体育队最近成功升入土耳其第二级联赛。

title: 'Chaos v calm' - Sutton's World Cup final and third-place predictions
summary: BBC football analyst Chris Sutton provides his predictions for the 2026 World Cup's final matches, characterizing Spain and Argentina's approaches as 'chaos v calm' before their meeting in the final. Sutton also predicts the outcome of the third-place playoff between France and England. The contrasting characterizations reflect different tactical philosophies heading into the tournament's conclusion.
content: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton makes his prediction for Spain against Argentina in the World Cup final, and the bronze final between France and England.

zh.title: "混乱对平静"- 萨顿对世界杯决赛和三四名排位赛的预测
zh.summary: BBC足球分析师克里斯·萨顿对2026年世界杯最后比赛做出预测,将西班牙和阿根廷的战术方式分别描述为"混乱对平静",预测他们在决赛中的对阵。萨顿还预测了法国和英格兰之间三四名排位赛的结果。这些对比鲜明的描述反映了不同战术哲学在赛事尾声阶段的体现。

title: Are Argentina being treated favourably at World Cup?
summary: Egypt has accused the World Cup organization of bias favoring Argentina and their star player Lionel Messi throughout the tournament. The allegation raises questions about fairness in officiating and tournament administration at the highest levels of international football. Such claims highlight ongoing debates about competitive impartiality in major sporting events.
content: Egypt have alleged bias in favour of Argentina and favouritism towards their star player, Lionel Messi. Is this fair?

zh.title: 阿根廷在世界杯中是否得到了优待?
zh.summary: 埃及指控世界杯组织在整个赛事中偏袒阿根廷及其明星球员莱昂内尔·梅西。这一指控引发了对国际足球最高水平赛事中裁判公正性和赛事管理的质疑。这样的指控凸显了关于大型体育赛事中竞技公正性的持续争议。

title: Leeds sign £34.1m defender Muharemovic
summary: Leeds United acquires defender Tarik Muharemovic from Italian club Sassuolo for £34.1m, marking a substantial investment in their defensive lineup. The transfer bolsters Leeds' squad depth and reinforces the club's commitment to strengthening their backline. Muharemovic's arrival represents a significant commitment to the club's defensive improvement.
content: Leeds United sign defender Tarik Muharemovic for £34.1m from Serie A side Sassuolo.

zh.title: 利兹联以3410万英镑签下防线新兵穆哈雷莫维奇
zh.summary: 利兹联从意大利球队萨索洛以3410万英镑收购后卫塔里克·穆哈雷莫维奇，这笔交易标志着他们在防线上的重大投资。此次转会增强了利兹队的阵容深度，强化了俱乐部加强后防线的承诺。穆哈雷莫维奇的到来代表了俱乐部对改善防线的重大投入。

title: Keep calm and carry on - Spain trust team identity to deliver World Cup
summary: Former Spain captain Cesar Azpilicueta explains the Spanish team's confidence in their collective identity under manager Luis de la Fuente as they prepare for the World Cup final against Argentina. Spain emphasizes team unity and established tactical philosophy rather than individual brilliance in their approach to the tournament's deciding match. This reflects a philosophical approach rooted in collective strength.
content: Former Spain captain Cesar Azpilicueta explains why Luis de la Fuente's side have confidence in the collective as they prepare for Sunday's World Cup final against Argentina.

zh.title: 保持冷静坚持不懈 - 西班牙信任团队身份赢得世界杯
zh.summary: 前西班牙队长塞萨尔·阿斯皮利库埃塔解释了在主教练路易斯·德拉弗恩特的带领下，西班牙队对其集体身份的信心，他们为对阵阿根廷的世界杯决赛做准备。西班牙强调在这场决赛中团队合作和既定战术理念，而不是个人光芒。这反映了一种植根于集体力量的哲学方法。

title: Hearts sign goalkeeper Reus as Schwolow departs
summary: Heart of Midlothian announces the departure of goalkeeper Alexander Schwolow and the arrival of replacement goalkeeper Beau Reus as part of squad adjustments. The change represents Hearts' strategic moves in their goalkeeping position heading into the new season. Both transfers indicate the club's plans to refresh their roster.
content: Heart of Midlothian announce the imminent departure of Alexander Schwolow and the arrival of a replacement goalkeeper, Beau Reus.

zh.title: 心脏队签约门神雷乌斯 施沃洛离队
zh.summary: 中洛锡安心脏队宣布门将亚历山大·施沃洛的离队和替补门将博·雷乌斯的加入，这是球队调整的一部分。这次变化代表了心脏队在新赛季前对门将位置的战略调整。两笔转会表明俱乐部计划刷新阵容。

title: Liverpool midfielder Szoboszlai signs new five-year deal
summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai commits to the club with a new five-year contract extension at Anfield, reflecting his importance to the team's midfield. The long-term deal demonstrates both the player's confidence in the club and Liverpool's belief in his future contributions. Szoboszlai's contract renewal strengthens squad stability for the Merseyside club.
content: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai signs a new five-year contract at Anfield.

zh.title: 利物浦中场萨博斯兹莱签署新的五年合约
zh.summary: 利物浦中场球员多米尼克·萨博斯兹莱与俱乐部签订五年新合约，彰显了他在球队中场的重要地位。这份长期合约体现了球员对俱乐部的信心以及利物浦对其未来贡献的期许。萨博斯兹莱的续约加强了梅赛德郡俱乐部的阵容稳定性。

title: Five reasons for England to be cheerful despite World Cup exit
summary: Despite England's elimination in the World Cup semi-finals, analysts identify multiple positive factors supporting optimism about the national team's future prospects. The article highlights reasons for encouragement despite the tournament disappointment, examining the foundations for long-term success. This perspective looks beyond the immediate setback to the broader trajectory of English football.
content: Despite the heartbreak of a World Cup semi-final loss, there are plenty of reasons to be optimistic about England's footballing future.

zh.title: 英格兰队世界杯出局后保持乐观的五个理由
zh.summary: 尽管英格兰队在世界杯半决赛遭淘汰，分析人士仍指出多个积极因素支持对国家队前景的乐观预期。文章突出强调了尽管锦标赛失利但值得鼓舞的原因，并深入审视了长期成功的基础。这一视角超越了眼前的挫折，展望了英格兰足球发展的更大轨迹。

title: Uefa will not use VAR for diving like at World Cup
summary: UEFA has instructed video assistant referees not to penalize diving or simulation as instances of mistaken identity, changing from protocols used at the 2026 World Cup. This directive aims to create consistency between VAR enforcement in club competitions and major tournaments. The change reflects UEFA's approach to standardizing video review procedures across competitions.
content: Uefa has told its video assistant referees (VARs) they must not consider potential simulation as mistaken identity, as seen at the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 欧足联将不像世界杯那样用视频助理裁判处罚潜水动作

title: World Cup quiz: Can you name every finalist?
summary: A quiz testing knowledge of World Cup finalists as the tournament's final match approaches. The piece provides trivia engagement for fans interested in the teams that reached the finals.
content: As we approach Sunday's World Cup final, test your knowledge of the teams who have made it to this stage before.

title: Birmingham City sign Canada defender Levasseur

title: How World Cup final could be pivotal in Ballon d'Or race
summary: With the Ballon d'Or race being unusually competitive, the World Cup final could significantly influence the 2026 award winner. Strong individual performances in the final may determine voting outcomes.
content: With the Ballon d'Or race tighter than ever before, BBC Sport looks at how the World Cup final could determine the 2026 winner.

zh.title: 世界杯决赛将如何影响金球奖竞争

title: Pele at the Azteca? England in '66? Ranking the best World Cup finals
summary: BBC Sport ranks the greatest World Cup finals in history, including Pelé's 1970 victory at the Azteca, Messi's 2022 triumph, and England's 1966 home victory. The ranking evaluates finals based on historical significance and sporting drama.
content: Pele and Brazil at the Azteca in 1970? Lionel Messi's first World Cup? England winning it on home soil in 1966? BBC Sport attempts to rank the best finals.

zh.title: 球王在阿兹特克？英格兰在66年？排名最伟大的世界杯决赛

title: Tuchel did not deliver, but his time with England is not up - Shearer
summary: Alan Shearer suggests England manager Thomas Tuchel will not be discouraged by criticism following the World Cup semi-final loss. Shearer believes Tuchel's tenure with England is far from over despite the disappointing result.
content: Former England captain Alan Shearer says Three Lions boss Thomas Tuchel will not be fazed by criticism he has faced over the World Cup semi-final defeat.

zh.title: 图赫尔没有交出成绩，但他在英格兰的时代还没有结束——谢勒

title: West Ham captain Bowen to stay at club
summary: West Ham United captain Jarrod Bowen will remain with the club for the upcoming Championship season. The retention of the captain provides leadership continuity during the team's adjustment to a new division.
content: West Ham United captain Jarrod Bowen will stay at the club for the forthcoming season in the Championship.

title: Underdogs, history and late goals - Africa's World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup featured Africa's largest-ever representation at the finals, but five African teams were eliminated by late goals. Underdogs like Cape Verde impressed despite the continent's disappointing late exits.
content: The 2026 World Cup saw Africa send its largest ever contingent to the finals, but five sides were eliminated by late goals as underdogs Cape Verde impressed.

summary: Manchester City hosted clubs at their training ground to showcase available loan talent during the summer transfer window. The exhibition displays the depth of City's squad and creates opportunities for other clubs to acquire players.
content: Manchester City welcome clubs to their training ground to showcase the talent that is on offer during the summer transfer window.

title: Aston Villa sign defender Harviken from Juventus
summary: Aston Villa have signed Norwegian international defender Mathilde Harviken from Juventus. The acquisition strengthens their defensive options for the upcoming season.

title: Defender Esteve leaves Burnley to join RB Leipzig
summary: Former France Under-21 defender Maxime Esteve has left Burnley to join Bundesliga side RB Leipzig for £27.3 million. The move represents a step up to a stronger league after his Championship experience.
content: Former France Under-21s defender Maxime Esteve leaves Burnley to join Bundesliga club RB Leipzig for a reported fee of £27.3m.

title: How have missed targets affected Newcastle's summer rebuild?
summary: Newcastle United have missed out on targeted signings including Johan Manzambi and Victor Munoz this summer. The club continues pursuing players who are eager to join as part of their squad rebuild.

title: Spain 2010 v Spain 2026: How do the two XIs compare?
summary: BBC Sport compares Spain's 2010 World Cup-winning squad to the current 2026 team attempting to replicate that success. The analysis examines how team composition and quality has evolved over 16 years.
content: How do Spain's 2010 World Cup winners compare to the current contingent who are looking to match their feat in the 2026 tournament? BBC Sport takes a look.

zh.summary: BBC体育频道将西班牙2010年世界杯冠军阵容与试图复制其成功的2026年当前球队进行对比。该分析探讨了16年间球队组成和整体质量的演变。

title: Defender Cascarino joins West Ham in permanent deal
summary: West Ham have signed French international defender Estelle Cascarino permanently following an initial six-month loan spell. The club converted the temporary deal to a permanent arrangement after evaluating her performance.
content: West Ham have signed France international Estelle Cascarino on a permanent deal following an initial six-month loan spell.

zh.title: 后卫卡斯卡里诺与西汉姆联队签订正式合约
zh.summary: 西汉姆联队在六个月试用期后，将法国国家队后卫埃斯特尔·卡斯卡里诺转为正式球员。该俱乐部在评估了她的表现后，决定将临时协议转换为永久合约。

title: Thousands of tickets still available for England v France
summary: Approximately 7,000 tickets remain available on FIFA's ticketing platform for Saturday's World Cup bronze medal match between England and France. The ticket availability suggests lighter sales interest for this third-place playoff game.
content: Around 7,000 tickets are still listed on Fifa's ticket sites for Saturday's World Cup bronze medal match between England and France.

zh.title: 英格兰对法国比赛仍有数千张门票可购
zh.summary: 国际足联售票平台上周六英法世界杯季军赛仍有约7000张门票可售。门票供应量充足表明这场第三名争夺战的购票兴趣相对较低。

title: Arsenal sign teenage Danish goalkeeper Damm
summary: Arsenal have permanently signed Danish youth international goalkeeper Isabella Damm from Brondby IF. The acquisition represents investment in the club's goalkeeping future with a young prospect.
content: Arsenal have signed Danish youth international goalkeeper Isabella Damm on a permanent transfer from Brondby IF.

zh.title: 阿森纳签约丹麦小将门神达姆
zh.summary: 阿森纳从布隆德比俱乐部正式签约丹麦青年国门伊莎贝拉·达姆。这次引援代表俱乐部在门将位置的未来投资，看好这位年轻才俊的发展前景。

title: World Cup rings for winners as Trump attendance confirmed
summary: Donald Trump will present the trophy to the 2026 World Cup final winners, and championship rings will be awarded to the victorious team. Trump's attendance at the final underscores the event's global significance and high-profile nature in international sports. The trophy presentation and rings tradition mark the culmination of the tournament.
content: Donald Trump will present the trophy to the World Cup final winners on Sunday, and rings will be presented to the victorious side.

zh.title: 世界杯冠军戒指已定 特朗普出席确认
zh.summary: 唐纳德·特朗普将为2026年世界杯决赛冠军颁发奖杯，获胜球队将获得冠军戒指。特朗普出席决赛彰显了该赛事的全球意义和国际体育中的高调性质。奖杯颁发和戒指传统标志着本届锦标赛的圆满落幕。

title: England missing final piece of jigsaw - Kane
summary: England captain Harry Kane says the team is missing crucial elements after their World Cup defeat to Argentina, indicating the need for tactical and squad improvements.
content: England captain Harry Kane says the team are "missing that final piece of the jigsaw" and need to "find a way to get better" following defeat to Argentina.

zh.title: 英格兰缺少最后一块拼图 - 凯恩
zh.summary: 英格兰队长哈里·凯恩表示，球队在世界杯对阿根廷的失利后缺少关键因素，表明需要进行战术和阵容改进。

title: Sheffield United manager Wilder extends contract
summary: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder has extended his contract through summer 2028, securing his position in his third spell with the club.
content: Chris Wilder, in his third spell as Sheffield United manager, extends his contract until the summer of 2028.

zh.title: 谢菲尔德联队主教练威尔德延长合同
zh.summary: 谢菲尔德联队主教练克里斯·威尔德已将合同延长至2028年夏天，确保了他在俱乐部第三个任期内的地位。

title: Listen: How does Gordon rate in goalkeeping greats? Plus League Cup preview
summary: This podcast episode examines Craig Gordon's legacy among the greatest goalkeepers while previewing upcoming League Cup fixtures and discussing World Cup final predictions. The discussion evaluates Gordon's career achievements and impact on Scottish football alongside near-term competitive preview content. The episode combines retrospective analysis of a legendary career with forward-looking tournament coverage.
content: Craig Gordon retires, League Cup preview and who's going to win the World Cup?

zh.title: 收听：戈登在伟大门神中排名如何？附英格兰联赛杯预览
zh.summary: 本期播客节目考察了克雷格·戈登在伟大门神中的遗产，同时预览即将进行的英格兰联赛杯比赛，并讨论世界杯决赛预测。讨论评估了戈登的职业成就和他对苏格兰足球的影响，同时涵盖近期竞争预览内容。该节目将对传奇职业生涯的回顾分析与前瞻性的锦标赛覆盖相结合。

title: Dragojevic deal almost done for Rangers - gossip
summary: Serbian midfielder Dragojevic is close to completing a transfer to Rangers, while a Celtic defender reportedly moves to France in the ongoing summer window.
content: Serbian midfielder close to completing Rangers switch, with Celtic defender on the way to France...

zh.title: 德拉戈耶维奇交易即将完成 - 流言蜚语
zh.summary: 塞尔维亚中场球员德拉戈耶维奇即将完成转会至流浪者队，而凯尔特人后卫据报道在夏季转会窗口期间转会至法国。

title: World Cup stars who could move this summer
summary: As the World Cup concludes, attention turns to the 2026-27 club season with several World Cup-winning players expected to transfer during the summer window.
content: As the World Cup approaches its end, attentions are turning to the 2026-27 club season - and the players who could be on the move this summer.

zh.title: 可能在今年夏天转会的世界杯明星
zh.summary: 随着世界杯的结束，人们的关注转向2026-27赛季，多名世界杯冠军球员预计将在夏季转会窗口期间完成转会。

title: Wrexham boss Parkinson relishing Man Utd 'test'
summary: Wrexham will face Manchester United in a friendly in Helsinki, with United manager Michael Carrick unavailable due to World Cup players needing rest.
content: Wrexham take on the Premier League giants in Helsinki on Saturday, although United boss Michael Carrick will be without several of his World Cup players.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆主帅帕金森期待曼联的"考验"
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆将在赫尔辛基与曼联进行友谊赛，由于世界杯球员需要休息，曼联主帅迈克尔·卡里克将无法参加。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 40
summary: A interactive guessing game where readers attempt to identify a World Cup star player in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player? Try to guess his identity in as few attempts as possible.

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯明星第40号
zh.summary: 一个互动猜谜游戏，读者们尝试通过尽可能少的尝试来识别一位世界杯明星球员。

title: Effort, spirit and moments - but do England lack all-round quality?
summary: BBC Sport analyst Phil McNulty evaluates England's World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, questioning whether Thomas Tuchel's team lacks sufficient all-around quality despite strong effort and moments.
content: As England reflect on their World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina, BBC Sport's Phil McNulty looks at what Thomas Tuchel's team were lacking.

zh.title: 努力、精神和亮点 - 但英格兰缺乏全面实力吗？
zh.summary: BBC体育分析师菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂评估了英格兰在世界杯半决赛中对阿根廷的失败，质疑托马斯·图赫尔的球队是否缺乏足够的全面实力，尽管表现出了强大的拼搏精神和精彩时刻。
